## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, upcoming product launches, and outbound initiatives for HeyGen.](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with \~40-50 blogs per month, aiming for 25 by end of September](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [New focus areas: e-learning campaign, enterprise targeting, API product launch, and tools directory](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Outbound initiative planned to target 3,500 marketing agencies for backlink collaboration and potential sales](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Team to start producing e-learning thought leadership content immediately](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [Currently producing 10 blogs per week, 40-50 per month](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [5 content refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Aiming for 25 blogs by end of September](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Capacity to scale up production as needed](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Upcoming Product Launches and Priorities

  - [API product launch within next 2 weeks with competitive pricing](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [E-learning campaign](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Enterprise targeting](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Tools directory launch](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Template library development](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### Tools Directory and Translation Pages

  - [Content ready for tools directory, awaiting migration to new page templates](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Translation pages strategy being rethought due to Webflow limitations](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Focus on top 10 languages correlating to highest revenue](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### Enterprise Content Strategy

  - [Target content for marketing, sales, learning & development, and localization teams](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Create content around specific use cases and value creation moments](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Improve internal linking structure for better content exposure](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Outbound Initiative

  - [List of 3,500 marketing agencies prepared for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Plan to use AirOps for email personalization and content collaboration outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Nav to test initial batch of 50-100 emails for backlink collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### E-learning Content

  - [Bisera to send list of e-learning topics for approval within hours](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Team to start producing e-learning thought leadership content immediately](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Aiming for 2-3 blogs published per week on e-learning](https://fathom.video/share/Z6zR_LFvG-CuqcmTnoHytGdM6-ypyKS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
